# SessionTranscript golden vectors

SYNTHETIC, generated by TestGenerateSessionTranscriptGoldens from the
OID4VPHandover / OID4VPDCAPIHandover constructors (sessiontranscript.go) with
the fixed inputs in sessiontranscript_test.go (tClientID, tNonce, tMdocNonce,
tRespURI, tOrigin).

Encoding implemented from OpenID4VP 1.0 Annex B.2.6 (redirect + DC-API):
  SessionTranscript      = [null, null, Handover]
  OID4VPHandover         = [SHA-256(CBOR([client_id, mdoc_generated_nonce])),
                            SHA-256(CBOR([response_uri, mdoc_generated_nonce])),
                            nonce]
  OID4VPDCAPIHandover    = ["OpenID4VPDCAPIHandover",
                            SHA-256(CBOR([origin, client_id, nonce]))]

PENDING (phase-0 gate, SPECREFS.md): the OpenID4VP Annex B CDDL and ISO/IEC TS
18013-7 are not vendored. Cross-check these vectors byte-for-byte against the
EUDI reference wallet and the OpenID4VP 1.0 Annex B text before freezing. If the
hash-input tuples or the DC-API info tuple differ, fix the constructors +
regenerate here (the constructors are the single generator).
